info.title: RugSense
info.description: The launch-lifecycle risk desk for Base, with a public, verifiable hit rate. Each freshly-launched token gets one machine-actionable AVOID/WATCH/HOT decision (0-100 composite, calibrated safetyConfidence, transparent per-signal checks[]) — deterministic, no LLM. What a freshly-prompted agent + free scanners can't reproduce: (1) behavioral signals that catch the ~35% of rugs with no code-level risk — funding-source wallet clusters, sniper/bundle supply, transaction-graph centrality, serial-deployer reputation, and a repeat-offender wallet denylist built from rugs we've confirmed; (2) a leakage-free, point-in-time track record (every verdict snapshotted at score time, graded strictly later) at GET /api/track-record and GET /api/history; (3) push lifecycle alerts via GET /api/watch; (4) an accumulating deployer dossier at GET /api/deployer. Snapshot signals also include honeypot + buy/sell tax (trade sim), mintable/blacklist/pausable + ownership, owner-mutable latent-honeypot, holder concentration, and LP burn/lock + duration (Uniswap v2 + v3). Paid endpoints settle per-request over x402 v2 (USDC on Base) — no API keys, no signup; an unpaid request returns HTTP 402 with an x402 challenge (pay and retry). /api/track-record and /api/history are free. See docs/INTEGRATE.md.

get.description: Returns freshly-launched Base tokens, each scored for safety + momentum into an AVOID/WATCH/HOT decision, sorted by composite. Discoverable on x402 Bazaar / Agentic.Market.
The 'is THIS token safe?' check. Returns the full scored assessment for a given Base token address. Settles only on success — an invalid address (400) or a token with no pool (404) is not charged.

404.description: No DEX pair found for this token on Base

get.summary: Batch-score up to 20 Base tokens in one call
get.description: Pre-screen a watchlist: score many Base tokens at once, each with its AVOID/WATCH/HOT decision + composite + per-signal checks. Feed-grade scoring (cheaper per-token than individual /api/token calls; for the Etherscan-deep deployer/cluster verify on a single token use /api/token/{address}). Flat $0.10/call for up to 20 tokens. Charged only if at least one address resolves to a Base pool.

400.description: No valid address in the request

404.description: None of the addresses resolved to a Base pool

get.summary: Fast, cheap pre-screen for one Base token ($0.005)
get.description: The high-frequency triage gate: a DexScreener-grade AVOID/WATCH/HOT score for one token, no onchain/Etherscan deep-dive. Use it to filter many candidates fast, then deep-verify survivors with /api/token. Settles only on success (invalid address 400 / no pool 404 not charged).

404.description: No DEX pair found for this token on Base

get.summary: Register a token for lifecycle webhook alerts ($0.05, 7 days)
get.description: Push, not pull. Register a token + callback URL; we re-score it on our schedule for 7 days and POST your callback the moment the verdict changes or a rug is in progress (liquidity collapse / pool removed). The continuous monitoring a single scored read can't give you. Settles only on success (bad address 400 / no pool 404 / missing callback 400 not charged).

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: HTTPS URL to receive webhook POSTs ({event,address,symbol,prevTier,tier,liquidityUsd,dropPct,reason,firedAt})

404.description: No DEX pair found for this token on Base

get.description: Our proprietary, compounding record for a deployer wallet: every token we've seen it ship, prior-rug outcomes, first-seen date, and repeat-offender denylist status. Pass a deployer EOA or a token address (we resolve its deployer). Data that grows with our operation — not re-derivable from a single free-API call. An unknown deployer returns 200 with found:false.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Deployer EOA or token contract address

200.description: Deployer dossier (found:false when no history on file)

get.description: The leakage-free scoreboard of every RugSense verdict: avoid.precisionPct = share of resolved AVOIDs that rugged; safe.cleanPct = share of resolved HOT/WATCH that did NOT rug. Every token was snapshotted at score time and graded strictly later, so the numbers can't be inflated by post-collapse data. Free — the proof that makes the paid endpoints worth buying.

get.summary: Leakage-free backtest log of resolved verdicts (FREE)
get.description: Every verdict that has resolved to a terminal outcome (rugged vs survived), with the call timestamp and time-to-resolve. Each row was snapshotted at score time and graded strictly later. Verify the signal is worth paying for, with no data leakage.

PaymentRequired.description: x402 v2 payment challenge. The PaymentRequired payload is in the base64 PAYMENT-REQUIRED response header (scheme exact, network eip155:8453, USDC, $0.03). Pay with an x402 client and retry.

composite.description: 0-100, safety-gated — the number to gate on

safetyConfidence.description: 0-100; share of safety checks with a definitive result

safetyPartial.description: true → key checks could not run; treat with caution

safety.description: Raw safety facts: honeypot, buyTax, sellTax, verified, proxy, mintable, ownershipRenounced, top10Pct, whaleCount, lpSecuredPct, lpLockType, lpUnlocksInDays, sniperPct, firstBlockBuyers, fundingClusterSize, deployer, deployerDeployments, deployerAgeDays, deployerPriorTokens, deployerPriorRugged

Scoreboard.description: Leakage-free, point-in-time hit rate. precisionPct/cleanPct are null until enough verdicts resolve.

avoid.description: AVOID outcomes + ruggedWithin72h, watching, precisionPct (share of resolved AVOIDs that rugged)

safe.description: HOT+WATCH outcomes + watching, cleanPct (share of resolved HOT/WATCH that did NOT rug)

byTier.description: Per-tier TierOutcome for AVOID, WATCH, HOT

scoredAt.description: ms epoch — when we made the call

resolvedAt.description: ms epoch — when the outcome was observed (strictly later)

onDenylist.description: true → this wallet deployed a rug we confirmed

tokensSeen.description: distinct tokens we've observed from this deployer

snapshot.description: latest scan facts: deployments, ageDays, priorTokens, priorRugged
